name: design-director
description: Selran Design Director — direct high-quality visual work from Claude: websites, web apps, dashboards, native iOS/Android, documents, slide decks, posters. Pick a direction from seven rendered starter designs, get a portable design-system.md, and have it enforced across every artifact — dark mode, component library, accessibility audits, i18n/RTL, performance budgets — while generic AI-slop defaults are blocked. MIT core; extensible via independently licensed add-on packs.
